seo.title: NDT Testing Services
seo.description: RECPL offers advanced NDT services for civil and mechanical structures including ultrasonic testing, eddy current testing, magnetic particle inspection, and dye penetrant testing.

hero.title: NDT of Civil and Mechanical Structures & Equipment
hero.summary: Reliable non-destructive inspection for safety, integrity, and compliance without damaging the asset under test.
hero.description: RECPL offers a full range of non-destructive testing services for civil structures, pressure equipment, fabricated components, and critical industrial machinery items.

backgroundImage.alt: RECPL engineers performing non-destructive inspection and structural integrity assessment on industrial infrastructure

intro.title: Reliable Inspection Without Damaging the Asset
paragraphs: Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) is a group of inspection techniques used to evaluate the properties and integrity of materials, components, and structures without causing any damage.

RECPL’s NDT professionals are certified to ASNT SNT-TC-1A standards and use calibrated, industry-grade equipment to deliver accurate and reliable results in compliance with relevant IS, ASME, ASTM, and AWS codes.

image.alt: RECPL engineers planning non-destructive testing activities at an industrial site

highlights.label: IS, ASME, ASTM, and AWS aligned reporting

methods.title: Testing Methods and Capabilities
methods.description: Advanced testing methods for civil and mechanical structures, welds, fabricated equipment, and critical components.

items.title: Ultrasonic Testing (UT)
items.description: High-frequency sound waves are used to detect internal flaws, measure thickness, and assess weld integrity in pressure vessels, pipelines, castings, and forgings.

items.title: Magnetic Particle Inspection (MPI)
items.description: Detects surface and near-surface discontinuities in ferromagnetic materials including welds, castings, forgings, and machined components.

items.title: Dye Penetrant Testing (DPT / LPT)
items.description: Identifies cracks, porosity, and other open-to-surface discontinuities on non-porous materials and non-ferromagnetic metals.

items.title: Eddy Current Testing (ECT)
items.description: Uses electromagnetic induction to detect surface and near-surface defects in conductive materials, especially heat exchanger tubes and pipes.

items.title: Hardness Testing
items.description: Portable Brinell, Rockwell, Vickers, and Leeb testing for material verification, heat-treatment validation, and weld procedure qualification.

items.title: Universal Testing Machine (UTM) Testing
items.description: Evaluates tensile, compressive, yield, and elongation properties for metallic and non-metallic materials used in industrial applications.

items.title: Additional NDT & Testing Services
items.description: Macro examination, pickling tests, positive material identification (PMI), rebound hammer testing, and UPV testing for concrete quality assessment.

applications.title: Structures, Equipment, and Components We Test

industries.label: Structural steel members and fabricated welds
RCC, PSC, bridges, chimneys, and flyovers

Weld joints in fabrication and erection

cta.title: Need advanced NDT support for your assets?
cta.description: From weld inspection and thickness gauging to PMI, UPV, and hardness surveys, RECPL provides reliable inspection data for informed engineering decisions.
